title: sshPilot plugin manifest
description: Schema for a plugin.json. See docs/plugins/writing-plugins.md.

id.description: Stable unique id. Used as the on-disk directory name, the connection 'protocol' value for protocol plugins, and the keyring/settings namespace. Lowercase letters, digits, '-' and '_'.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in Preferences ▸ Plugins.

api_version.description: Major version of the plugin API this targets. The app loads a plugin only when this equals the app's API_VERSION[0]; a mismatch is skipped (shown 'Incompatible' in Preferences).

builtin.description: True only for plugins shipped inside the app under sshpilot/plugins/builtin/. Third-party/user plugins omit this or set false.

required.description: Built-in only: load even if listed in plugins.disabled (e.g. the SSH protocol). Third-party plugins must not set this.

entry.description: Reserved/ignored. The loader always instantiates a class named 'Plugin' in the package's __init__.py.

permissions.description: Capabilities the plugin uses. Shown to the user before they enable/install it (informed consent; not yet enforced). Declare every capability you use.
